query:
SELECT 'lambing_records' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM lambing_log WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'weight_logs', COUNT(*) FROM weight_log WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ration_plans', COUNT(*) FROM ration_plans WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'feed_stock_entries', COUNT(*) FROM feed_stock_ledger WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
